data.name: Slutty Sluts Panic
data.detailed_description:
About this game:

Slutty Sluts Panic is an action puzzle arcade game. You have to draw into an area to reveal a naked waifu. Date hot chicks, avoid enemies, clear the areas and progress to unlock their nudes. But remember: no pussy for pussies. Uncensored content will be available only when you reach the minimum score or you beat the game!

Date hot chicks

Each of the 9 slutties available have 3 levels. Date all of them to get their nudes!

Clearing the areas

Draw lines in any of the four directions, (up, down, left, right), to clear the area. The biggest the chunk of area you draw, the biggest the bonus you get. Also make extra point for each of your remaining lives and remaining time.

Get their nudes!

Get a chick nude by clearing all of her levels, but remember: no pussy for pussies! Uncensored nudes will be unlocked only if you reach the required score or if you've already beaten the game.
You can check your sexy collection in your gallery.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 2GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
